title: URGENT: Senior/Design Engineer x3 (mechanical/semicon/mfg)
description:
What you'll be doing

  • Lead the design and development of innovative mechanical equipment and machines to meet client specifications and requirements

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including production and quality assurance, to ensure seamless project implementation

  • Conduct detailed analyses, simulations, and testing to validate design performance and reliability

  • Identify and implement process improvements to enhance efficiency and product quality

  • Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior engineers within the team

  • Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends, technologies, and best practices in mechanical engineering


What we're looking for

  • Bachelor's degree or higher in Mechanical Engineering or a related field

  • Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in mechanical design of equipment or machines, preferably in the semiconductor or manufacturing industries

  • Strong proficiency in CAD software, such as SolidWorks or AutoCAD, and data analysis tools

  • Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and critical thinking skills

  • Effective communication and collaboration abilities to work with cross-functional teams

  • Experience in project management and the ability to prioritize and deliver tasks within tight deadlines

  • Familiarity with industry standards, regulations, and best practices in mechanical engineering


HOW TO APPLY:

Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or submit your resume to ref68@trustrecruit.com.sg

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg

postedCompany.description:
Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
